title: CPT114 Certificate Of Coverage Under the Canada Pension Plan Pursuant to articles VI to X of the Agreement on Social Security Between the Government of Canada and the Government of the Republic of Chile - Canada.ca
content:
## CPT114 Certificate Of Coverage Under the Canada Pension Plan Pursuant to articles VI to X of the Agreement on Social Security Between the Government of Canada and the Government of the Republic of Chile
You must download the accessible fillable PDF to your computer. Use Acrobat Reader 10 or later to open the file. Do not click the link to open it in your web browser.
- Download and save the PDF to your computer
- Open the downloaded PDF in Acrobat Reader 10 or later
Form to request a Certificate of Coverage Under the Canada Pension Pursuant to Articles VI to X of the Agreement on Social Security Between Canada and the Republic of Chile for employed and self-employed person.

## Ways to get the form
- Download and fill out with Acrobat Reader You must download and open fillable PDFs in Acrobat Reader 10 or higher. Accessible Fillable PDF (cpt114-fill-21e.pdf)

### Download and fill out with Acrobat Reader
You must download and open fillable PDFs in Acrobat Reader 10 or higher.
- Accessible Fillable PDF (cpt114-fill-21e.pdf)
- Print and fill out by hand Standard print PDF (cpt114-21e.pdf)

### Print and fill out by hand
- Standard print PDF (cpt114-21e.pdf)
- Ask for an alternate format You can order alternate formats such as digital audio, electronic text, braille, and large print. Order alternate formats for persons with disabilities

### Ask for an alternate format
You can order alternate formats such as digital audio, electronic text, braille, and large print.
- Order alternate formats for persons with disabilities
- Search the Treaty List (Global Affairs Canada)
- International social security agreements and the Canada Pension Plan

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
